_doc.cats: category feature IDs as ints (decode via categories.json)
_doc.ea: Early Access (bool) = genre-70 present. Valve signal, NOT the SteamSpy tag.
_doc.adult: adult gate (bool) = content_desc code 3 or 4. Replaces the ADULT_TAGS heuristic; excludes code 1 (over-flags AAA).
_doc.art: store header path: '<sha1>/<file>' (modern) or '<file>' (legacy). Frontend prefixes the CDN base; presence of '/' selects which.
